GROUP BY users.age
ORDER BY users.age ASC;

SELECT t0.id
FROM departments AS t0
WHERE ((t0.id IN (2, 10, 59) OR t0.id IS NULL) AND (t0.id != 5 AND t0.id IS NOT NULL))
GROUP BY t0.id
ORDER BY t0.id DESC;

SELECT regions.id, orders.id, COUNT(*), SUM(orders.customer_id)
FROM orders RIGHT JOIN regions ON orders.id = regions.id
WHERE ((regions.id IN (8, 9, 22) AND regions.id <= 6) AND orders.id IN (39, 49, 104, 106))
GROUP BY regions.id, orders.id;

SELECT t0.id, t0.note, t0.region
FROM markets AS t0
WHERE ((t0.note = 'unknown' AND t0.id != 1) AND t0.id > 67)
ORDER BY t0.id ASC, t0.note DESC;

SELECT books.id, markets.id, books.price AS c2723
FROM books CROSS JOIN customers FULL JOIN markets ON customers.id = markets.id
WHERE ((markets.id > 55 AND customers.region_id NOT IN (8, 9, 10)) AND markets.region IN ('AMERICA', 'EUROPE'))
ORDER BY books.id DESC, markets.id ASC;

SELECT t0.region AS c1153, SUM(t0.id) AS c3569
FROM markets AS t0
GROUP BY t0.region
ORDER BY t0.region ASC;

SELECT customers.id, COUNT(customers.id) AS c434, COUNT(*)
FROM customers FULL JOIN departments ON customers.id = departments.id
WHERE departments.id BETWEEN 2 AND 4
GROUP BY customers.id
ORDER BY customers.id DESC;

SELECT departments.id, books.price AS c551
FROM departments CROSS JOIN books
WHERE departments.id = 5
ORDER BY departments.id DESC;

SELECT t0.region, t0.id, SUM(t0.id), COUNT(*)
FROM markets AS t0
GROUP BY t0.region, t0.id
ORDER BY t0.region ASC, t0.id DESC;

SELECT books.price AS c6589, books.id, COUNT(*)
FROM books
WHERE ((books.price > 77 OR books.id < 3) OR (books.price IN (49, 55, 55, 77) OR books.price IN (26, 66, 66, 68)))
GROUP BY books.price, books.id;

SELECT books.price, employees.id AS c7128
FROM employees RIGHT JOIN books ON employees.id = books.id
WHERE ((books.id > 68 OR books.id >= 52) AND (employees.department_id < 6 OR employees.department_id != 1))
ORDER BY books.price DESC;

SELECT orders.id AS c9121
FROM orders LEFT JOIN departments ON orders.id = departments.id RIGHT JOIN books ON departments.id = books.id
WHERE orders.customer_id <= 497
ORDER BY orders.id ASC;

SELECT employees.department_id AS c3770
FROM employees;

SELECT regions.id AS c2143, COUNT(*), COUNT(*)
FROM regions
WHERE regions.id IN (3, 10, 89)
GROUP BY regions.id;

SELECT employees.id, employees.department_id, SUM(employees.id), SUM(employees.department_id) AS c8963
FROM employees JOIN departments ON employees.id = departments.id
WHERE (departments.id <= 3 OR (employees.id = 68 OR employees.id <= 6))
GROUP BY employees.id, employees.department_id;

SELECT t0.note AS c4138
FROM markets AS t0 JOIN regions AS t1 ON t0.id = t1.id RIGHT JOIN orders AS t2 ON t0.id = t2.id
WHERE ((t2.customer_id = 298 OR t0.region = 'AMERICA') OR t0.region != 'AMERICA')
GROUP BY t0.note;

SELECT departments.id, COUNT(*) AS c9125
FROM departments
WHERE (departments.id > 56 OR departments.id = 4)
GROUP BY departments.id
ORDER BY departments.id DESC;

SELECT t0.id AS c7541, COUNT(t0.id)
FROM markets AS t0
WHERE (t0.note != 'Fast lane' AND (t0.id = 3 OR t0.note = 'Old World'))
GROUP BY t0.id;

SELECT t1.id, t2.id, SUM(t2.id)
FROM customers AS t0 RIGHT JOIN users AS t1 ON t0.id = t1.id LEFT JOIN orders AS t2 ON t0.id = t2.id
WHERE (t2.customer_id < 243 OR (t2.id >= 38 AND t2.customer_id = 302))
GROUP BY t1.id, t2.id
ORDER BY t2.id ASC;

SELECT t0.region, t1.customer_id AS c7183
FROM markets AS t0 RIGHT JOIN orders AS t1 ON t0.id = t1.id
WHERE ((t0.id <= 3 OR t0.note = 'Fast lane') AND (t0.note != 'North, South' OR t0.note = 'Fast lane'))
ORDER BY t0.region ASC;

SELECT t1.id, t0.id
FROM departments AS t0 LEFT JOIN orders AS t1 ON t0.id = t1.id JOIN employees AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.id;

SELECT t0.age, t0.id
FROM users AS t0
WHERE (t0.age > 5 AND t0.id != 2)
GROUP BY t0.age, t0.id;

SELECT t0.id
FROM regions AS t0 JOIN departments AS t1 ON t0.id = t1.id
WHERE t1.id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY t0.id;

SELECT orders.id AS c7996, books.price
FROM books FULL JOIN orders ON books.id = orders.id;

SELECT books.id AS c9150, books.price, COUNT(books.id)
FROM books
WHERE ((books.price IN (76, 77) AND books.id BETWEEN 1 AND 96) OR books.price IN (55, 66, 77))
GROUP BY books.id, books.price;

SELECT customers.region_id, employees.id
FROM customers JOIN employees ON customers.id = employees.id;

SELECT t0.id AS c6071, COUNT(*), COUNT(*) AS c7241
FROM regions AS t0 CROSS JOIN customers AS t1
WHERE ((t1.id >= 59 OR t0.id IS NULL) AND t1.id = 126)
GROUP BY t0.id;

SELECT t1.region_id, t1.id, t2.price
FROM regions AS t0 RIGHT JOIN customers AS t1 ON t0.id = t1.id LEFT JOIN books AS t2 ON t0.id = t2.id;

SELECT t0.region_id
FROM customers AS t0 RIGHT JOIN users AS t1 ON t0.id = t1.id RIGHT JOIN markets AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.id
WHERE t1.id < 14
ORDER BY t0.region_id ASC;

SELECT t0.age
FROM users AS t0;

SELECT t0.age
FROM users AS t0
GROUP BY t0.age
ORDER BY t0.age ASC;

SELECT t0.id
FROM markets AS t0 JOIN users AS t1 ON t0.id = t1.id
WHERE (t0.id != 2 OR t0.id != 1)
ORDER BY t0.id ASC;

SELECT books.price, employees.id, COUNT(*)
FROM customers LEFT JOIN books ON customers.id = books.id FULL JOIN employees ON customers.id = employees.id
WHERE ((customers.id > 96 AND employees.department_id != 32) AND (employees.id > 5 OR books.id IS NOT NULL))
GROUP BY books.price, employees.id
ORDER BY books.price DESC, employees.id DESC;

SELECT t2.region_id, t2.id
FROM orders AS t0 CROSS JOIN regions AS t1 FULL JOIN customers AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.id;

SELECT regions.id AS c1480
FROM regions
WHERE regions.id IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY regions.id DESC;

SELECT books.price, books.id
FROM books
WHERE (books.price < 44 AND (books.price IN (55, 55, 66, 66) AND books.price != 77))
ORDER BY books.price DESC, books.id DESC;

SELECT customers.region_id AS c4276, markets.region AS c7002, COUNT(*), COUNT(*) AS c3968
FROM customers LEFT JOIN markets ON customers.id = markets.id
WHERE (markets.note = 'Fast lane' OR customers.id IS NOT NULL)
GROUP BY customers.region_id, markets.region;

SELECT t1.region, t2.id, COUNT(t1.id)
FROM employees AS t0 CROSS JOIN markets AS t1 FULL JOIN regions AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.id
WHERE t0.department_id = 36
GROUP BY t1.region, t2.id;

SELECT t1.id, t0.id
FROM departments AS t0 CROSS JOIN customers AS t1
WHERE ((t1.id BETWEEN 28 AND 146 AND t1.id IN (46, 50, 104, 146)) OR (t0.id < 4 AND t1.region_id NOT IN (2, 2, 10, 12)))
ORDER BY t1.id DESC;

SELECT regions.id, departments.id AS c6050, COUNT(*), COUNT(*)
FROM regions RIGHT JOIN departments ON regions.id = departments.id
WHERE departments.id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY regions.id, departments.id
ORDER BY departments.id ASC;

SELECT t0.id, t0.region_id
FROM customers AS t0;

SELECT t0.department_id, t0.id
FROM employees AS t0
WHERE (t0.department_id >= 31 AND (t0.department_id > 34 OR t0.id < 33))
GROUP BY t0.department_id, t0.id
ORDER BY t0.department_id DESC;

SELECT employees.department_id, departments.id
FROM books LEFT JOIN employees ON books.id = employees.id FULL JOIN departments ON employees.id = departments.id;

SELECT orders.id AS c1456, orders.customer_id, COUNT(*), COUNT(orders.customer_id)
FROM orders
WHERE (orders.id > 86 OR orders.customer_id IS NULL)
GROUP BY orders.id, orders.customer_id;

SELECT t0.department_id, t0.id AS c8666, COUNT(*) AS c1170, COUNT(*)
FROM employees AS t0
WHERE t0.id IS NULL
GROUP BY t0.department_id, t0.id;

SELECT t0.id, t0.note AS c1949, t0.region
FROM markets AS t0;

SELECT books.price
FROM books
WHERE books.price IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY books.price DESC;

SELECT customers.region_id AS c2372
FROM customers
WHERE customers.region_id IN (4, 89)
ORDER BY customers.region_id DESC;

SELECT t0.age
FROM users AS t0;

SELECT t0.id AS c4185, SUM(t0.id)
FROM markets AS t0 LEFT JOIN orders AS t1 ON t0.id = t1.id
WHERE ((t0.id BETWEEN 1 AND 7 OR t0.note != 'North, South') AND (t0.note != 'Old World' AND t0.note IN ('ASIA', 'Old World', 'unknown')))
GROUP BY t0.id;

SELECT regions.id
FROM regions CROSS JOIN employees;

SELECT t0.id
FROM orders AS t0
WHERE (t0.id <= 95 OR t0.customer_id BETWEEN 55 AND 369)
ORDER BY t0.id DESC;

SELECT orders.id AS c9907, COUNT(*) AS c8627
FROM departments CROSS JOIN orders
WHERE ((orders.id >= 79 OR orders.customer_id IN (63, 185, 226, 480)) AND departments.id IS NULL)
GROUP BY orders.id
ORDER BY orders.id ASC;

SELECT customers.id, customers.region_id, SUM(customers.region_id), SUM(customers.id)
FROM customers
WHERE ((customers.region_id != 9 OR customers.id = 20) AND (customers.region_id >= 3 AND customers.id > 5))
GROUP BY customers.id, customers.region_id
ORDER BY customers.id DESC, customers.region_id ASC;

SELECT employees.department_id, employees.id
FROM employees;

SELECT orders.customer_id
FROM orders
WHERE (orders.id < 86 OR (orders.customer_id IN (21, 71) OR orders.customer_id NOT BETWEEN 371 AND 436))
ORDER BY orders.customer_id ASC;

SELECT t0.id AS c3548, t0.note, SUM(t0.id) AS c5991, COUNT(*)
FROM markets AS t0
WHERE ((t0.note IN ('Fast lane', 'Fast lane', 'Old World') OR t0.region = 'AMERICA') OR t0.id NOT IN (1, 2, 3))
GROUP BY t0.id, t0.note;

SELECT markets.id, books.id, COUNT(markets.id), COUNT(markets.id)
FROM regions CROSS JOIN books CROSS JOIN markets
WHERE regions.id != 5
GROUP BY markets.id, books.id;

SELECT markets.note, markets.region AS c394
FROM markets LEFT JOIN orders ON markets.id = orders.id LEFT JOIN employees ON orders.id = employees.id;

SELECT orders.customer_id AS c3285
FROM orders CROSS JOIN departments;

SELECT markets.note AS c1438, customers.region_id, markets.id AS c7869
FROM customers LEFT JOIN markets ON customers.id = markets.id CROSS JOIN regions;

SELECT orders.customer_id AS c6961, departments.id
FROM departments LEFT JOIN orders ON departments.id = orders.id
GROUP BY orders.customer_id, departments.id
ORDER BY departments.id DESC;

SELECT employees.department_id AS c8803, SUM(users.id), SUM(employees.id)
FROM users CROSS JOIN employees LEFT JOIN markets ON employees.id = markets.id
WHERE ((markets.id >= 18 OR users.id = 4) OR employees.id >= 2)
GROUP BY employees.department_id
ORDER BY employees.department_id ASC;

SELECT orders.id, orders.customer_id, books.price AS c2061
FROM orders CROSS JOIN books;

SELECT departments.id AS c2818, COUNT(departments.id), COUNT(departments.id)
FROM departments
WHERE departments.id <= 1
GROUP BY departments.id
ORDER BY departments.id DESC;
